indian.headline: Sensex gains 0.34% as weak US jobs data boost emerging market appeal; Bank Nifty slips.

tiles.sub: US June job growth slowed, reducing Fed rate-hike pressure; positive for emerging markets.
tiles.label: Global Cues

tiles.sub: SEBI shifts FPI fees to INR; India-Japan announce $10B investment roadmap.
tiles.label: FII Activity

tiles.sub: Government raised 31% of FY27 disinvestment target in Q1 via six PSU stake sales.
tiles.label: Capex Focus

indian.watch: Track Carlsberg IPO ₹7,100 crore fundraise and Zee Entertainment warrant issuance impact on sector valuations tomorrow.

us.headline: Dow hits fresh record on strong earnings; tech traders hedge bets as Nasdaq slides.

tiles.sub: Fresh record despite weak June jobs data and wage stagnation concerns.
tiles.label: Big Mover

tiles.sub: 720,000 workers exited job market in June; unemployment fell to 4.2%.
tiles.label: Key Data

tiles.sub: Put option buying at record levels signals Nasdaq trader caution ahead.
tiles.label: Sector Watch

us.watch: Monitor USMCA trade deal impact on autos and Mexico-Canada relations; watch tech volatility.
